narrative:
Monroe Twp township has 1,289 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
